title: Business Requirement frontmatter schema
description: Schema for BRQ artifacts — high-level business requirements, regulatory obligations, contractual commitments, and internal policies that drive system requirements (FR/NFR/CON). Reverse links (derived_requirements, derived_controls) are computed by the traceability script.

status.description: identified: captured from source; analyzed: impact understood; approved: accepted by stakeholders; allocated: derived FR/NFR/CON created; covered: all derived requirements verified; deprecated: no longer applicable

source_type.description: Origin category of this business requirement

source_docs.description: References to external documents (laws, standards, contracts, policies)

framework.description: Name of the regulatory framework (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, ISO-27001, EU-2023-1542)

regulatory_refs.description: Structured references to specific regulatory articles. Only for source_type: regulation or standard.

compliance_deadline.description: Date by which compliance must be achieved (YYYY-MM-DD)

stakeholders.description: Stakeholders who own or are affected by this requirement
